title: Totemic Wonders
description: Part of the okipiak's Stuff datapack. Adds more totems to the game.
body:
### Salutations!

I’m okipiak, an amateur content creator. In this project, I’ve added a new totems.

# ⚠️ THIS DATAPACK IS NO LONGER SUPPORTED ⚠️
**I have discontinued work on this project due to time constraints. This datapack is not optimized and lacks an uninstall option, so I strongly recommend not using it.**

However, I am now working on something new this time, it won’t be a datapack but Minecraft mod!

**This datapack is a part of my main project: [okipiak's Stuff](https://modrinth.com/datapack/okipiaks-stuff)**
<details>
<summary>Info</summary>
  
  This datapack is translated to 4 languages: Polish, English, LolCat and Interslavic (also known     as Medžuslovjansk). 
  
  Feel free to add this to your server. 

</details>

<details>
  <summary>How does it work?</summary>

  (Note: These totems do not function as a Totem of Undying.)
### Totem of Feline Grace
Can be found rarely in woodland mansions.

![Totem of Feline Grace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4218ecb242e31538ea06fac573e7c9369bcb9c98.png)

### Totem of Agile Nuisance
Can be found rarely in strongholds.

![Totem of Agile Nuisance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76ecc8bb0e0374e414efe5bdabd38a870179ff9a.png)

### Totem of Withering Might
Can be found rarely in Nether Fortresses.

![Totem of Withering Might](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/919e138b71d35cd73797c6a8dc49ce3568d2d500.png)
</details>
